name: 9p13_PAX5_region_SD
description: 9p13.2 region containing PAX5, FANCG, ALDH1B1 and a cluster of intermediate SDs. PAX5 is recurrent translocation/deletion partner in B-cell ALL; flanking SDs occasionally mediate intragenic rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Small SDs flanking PAX5 and within FANCG vicinity; rare intragenic and gene-fusion rearrangements in B-cell ALL.
